title: ThunderAgent — Program-aware Pause/Restore
summary_zh: Program-aware inference，透過遲滯水位線（hysteresis watermarks）進行週期性記憶體監控和 pause/restore 操作。當 KV cache thrashing 即將發生時，主動暫停活躍 agent。在可預測 tool-call 時間的工作流上優於 vLLM 和 Continuum 2.43–3.56×。
summary_en: Program-aware inference with periodic memory monitoring and pause/restore operations using hysteresis watermarks. Proactively pauses active agents when KV cache thrashing is imminent. Outperforms vLLM and Continuum by 2.43–3.56x on workflows with predictable tool-call times.
